description: Black canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long charcoal canvas tongue Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Comfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioning Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe region and heel region, and slanting grooves for superior grip on all terrains
